name: Review Cycle
description: Literature-evidence chain: run bounded critical analysis of a target paper, render manuscript latex, and export final research assets. This recipe assembles literature evidence and draft artifacts only; it is not an independent review gate. For independent review of an artifact, use the review-swarm skill; to verify a derivation, use the derivation-verify skill.

steps.purpose: Generate bounded critical analysis for the target paper
Render section/report draft into latex artifacts
